# Overcoming the Tempter
## Scripture
"Resist the devil and he will flee from you." – James 4:7
## Reflection
The enemy of our souls is relentless in his pursuit to bring us down. As warriors of Christ, it's essential that we learn to resist his temptations and attacks. We must put on the armor of God, including the belt of truth, the breastplate of righteousness, and the shield of faith (Ephesians 6:14-17). When we stand firm in our faith and resist the devil's schemes, we demonstrate our trust in God's power and provision. Remember, God has given us the victory through our Lord Jesus Christ (1 Corinthians 15:57). We must choose to put on the mind of Christ, resist the devil, and live a life that honors God.

## Daily Challenge
"Do 20 jumping jacks while declaring 'I resist the devil and he will flee from me'."
